name: Multiple Failures Reading Secrets
notes: This rule identifies multiple failures reading secrets (storage of sensitive information, such as passwords, OAuth tokens, ssh keys, etc).
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers
when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Read Activity Failed
when the event matches Resource (custom) is any of secrets
when at least 5 events are seen with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
thresholds: when at least 5 events are seen with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
TD_list: APPLY Multiple Failures Reading Secrets on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Containers
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Read Activity Failed
AND when the event matches Resource (custom) is any of secrets
AND when at least 5 events are seen with the same Username in 1 hour(s)
RED_list: Event name: Multiple Failures Reading Secrets
Event description: Detected multiple failures reading secrets in Container Environment.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
